reviewed_commits.subject: Define agent carrier factorization
notes: Concept separates Agent, Session, Carrier, Substrate, Operator Surface, Control Channel, and Trace substrate.
Locus factorization preserves Narada proper, User Site, and PC Site authority separation.
Anti-collapse rules correctly prevent carrier/runtime/surface convenience from becoming identity or task authority.

reviewed_commits.subject: Complete agent carrier factorization chapter
notes: Launch packet contract includes required identity, session, startup, environment, approval, native execution, evidence, and non-claim fields.
Focused regression test covers concept anchors, required launch packet fields, and authority boundary language.
Large task-lifecycle snapshot churn is evidence-heavy but not conceptually blocking for acceptance.
